name: Creamy Carrot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer until vegetables and rice are tender, about 20 minutes.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Puree mixture until smooth.
5. Just before serving, adjust seasonings as desired.
6. Reheat soup if needed, garnish, and serve hot.
